last_episode_to_air.name: The End of the Beginning
last_episode_to_air.overview: Confusion, chaos — and a deadly confrontation. The Camp Fam's so close to solving the mystery. But first, they'll have to fight for their lives.

name: Jurassic World: Chaos Theory
overview: The Camp Cretaceous gang comes together to unravel a mystery when they discover a global conspiracy that brings danger to dinosaurs — and to themselves.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: With the Nublar Five stowed away on a dinosaur-filled cargo ship headed to parts unknown, their mission to find who is after them sets them on a collision course with the mysterious Broker. Unaware that Brooklynn is alive, the discovery of her whereabouts will call into question everything they thought they knew about each other.

episodes.name: Aftershock
episodes.overview: Years after escaping the dangers of Isla Nublar, Darius and friends are living among dinosaurs again — all while processing a devastating loss.

episodes.name: Rest Stop
episodes.overview: A frightening chase fuels Ben's theory that the Nublar Six are being hunted... but by whom? Darius agrees to go to Texas.

episodes.name: Down on the Ranch
episodes.overview: Uninvited guests disrupt a happy reunion on Sammy's ranch. A mysterious map contains a cryptic clue from Brooklynn — but what does it mean?

episodes.name: Brothers
episodes.overview: The crew arrives in Colorado to warn Kenji, who's still punishing Darius about the past. Sammy and Ben leave the group to go look for Yaz.

episodes.name: Halfway Home
episodes.overview: Ben and Sammy make a pit stop for snacks at King Dino's Prehistoric Playland. Kenji confronts his father, who gives him an ultimatum.

episodes.name: Free Fall
episodes.overview: A surprised Yaz welcomes Sammy and Ben to a protected island and gives them a tour. But is it really a "dinosaur-free zone" — or too good to be true?

episodes.name: That Night
episodes.overview: It's a night of revelations for Kenji and Darius when a mysterious stranger tells them everything he knows. Meanwhile for the others, it's sink or swim.

episodes.name: The Drop
episodes.overview: Ben, Yaz and Sammy search for answers at the DPW — and find an old friend. Darius and Kenji make a shocking discovery on Brooklynn's phone.

episodes.name: Into the Fog
episodes.overview: Following trucks through foggy weather, the friends arrive at a warehouse packed with dinosaurs. It's a huge operation... but who's behind it?

episodes.name: The End of the Beginning
episodes.overview: Confusion, chaos — and a deadly confrontation. The Camp Fam's so close to solving the mystery. But first, they'll have to fight for their lives.

2.name: Season 2
2.overview: With the Nublar Five stowed away on a dinosaur-filled cargo ship headed to parts unknown, their mission to find who is after them sets them on a collision course with the mysterious Broker. Unaware that Brooklynn is alive, the discovery of her whereabouts will call into question everything they thought they knew about each other.
